questions.question: Chhote bachhon ke vikas mein 'Fine Motor Skills' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Chhoti muscles ka istemal, jaise likhna ya button lagana
options.C: Tez bolna

questions.explanation: Fine motor skills ka matlab haath aur ungliyon ki chhoti manspeshiyon (muscles) ka upyog karke kiye jaane wale kaam hain, jaise drawing karna, beads pirona, ya likhna.

questions.question: Jab ek bachha rota hai, to ek teacher ko sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Use daantna
options.C: Uske rone ka kaaran shaanti se puchhna aur use sahanubhuti dena
options.D: Use class se bahar bhej dena

questions.explanation: Ek teacher ka kartavya hai ki woh bachhe ki bhavnaon (emotions) ko samjhe aur use surakshit mehsoos karaye. Rone ka kaaran jaan kar use sahanubhuti dena sabse accha tarika hai.

questions.question: Cognitive development (sanganatmak vikas) ka sambandh kisse hai?

options.B: Sochne, samajhne aur samasya suljhane ki kshamta se
options.C: Dosto ke saath khelne se

questions.explanation: Cognitive development bachhe ki mansik prakriyaon jaise soch, smaran shakti (memory), aur problem-solving skills ke vikas se juda hai.

questions.question: 2 se 3 saal ke bachhe aam taur par kis tarah ka khel khelte hain?

options.B: Parallel play (ek doosre ke paas, par alag-alag khelna)
options.C: Team sports

questions.explanation: Is umar mein bachhe aksar 'Parallel Play' karte hain. Woh doosre bachhon ke bagal mein baithkar khelte hain, lekin unke saath milkar nahi khelte. Yeh social development ka ek mahatvapurna charan hai.

questions.question: Language development ke liye sabse important kya hai?

options.B: Usse lagatar baat karna, kahaniyan sunana aur gaane gana
options.C: Use sirf TV dikhana

questions.explanation: Bachhon se baat karne, unhe kahaniyan sunane aur unke saath gaane se unki vocabulary aur communication skills tezi se develop hoti hain.

questions.question: Ek bachha jo 'separation anxiety' mehsoos kar raha hai, uske kya lakshan hote hain?

options.A: Woh school aane mein khush hota hai
options.B: Woh apne parents se alag hone par rota ya pareshan hota hai
options.C: Woh doosre bachhon se jhagda karta hai

questions.explanation: Separation anxiety ek normal developmental stage hai jisme bachha apne primary caregiver (jaise mata-pita) se alag hone par darta ya chintit hota hai.

questions.question: 'Gross Motor Skills' ka kaun sa udaharan hai?

options.B: Ball ko kick karna
options.C: Jigsaw puzzle solve karna

questions.explanation: Gross motor skills mein sharir ki badi muscles ka istemal hota hai, jaise daudna, koodna, ya ball ko kick karna.

questions.question: Jean Piaget ke anusar, 'Object Permanence' ka concept kis stage mein develop hota hai?

options.B: Preoperational Stage
options.C: Concrete Operational Stage

questions.explanation: Object Permanence (yeh samajh ki cheezein dikhayi na dene par bhi astitva mein rehti hain) Sensorimotor stage (janm se 2 saal) mein viksit hota hai.

questions.question: Social-emotional development ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Apni aur doosron ki bhavnaon ko samajhna aur manage karna
options.C: Bahut saare dost banana

questions.explanation: Isme bachhe apni feelings ko pehchanna, unhe express karna, doosron ke prati sahanubhuti rakhna aur positive relationships banana seekhte hain.

questions.question: Ek 4 saal ka bachha agar kalpanik (imaginary) dost se baat karta hai, to yeh kya hai?

options.B: Ek normal aur creative developmental stage hai
options.C: Bachhe ke akelepan ka sanket hai
options.D: Use psychologist ke paas le jaana chahiye

questions.explanation: Is umar mein imaginary friends hona bachhe ki imagination aur creativity ka prateek hai. Yeh ek bilkul normal hissa hai bachpan ka.

questions.question: Vygotsky ki theory mein 'Zone of Proximal Development' (ZPD) kya hai?

options.A: Bachha jo akele kar sakta hai
options.B: Bachha jo bilkul nahi kar sakta
options.C: Woh kaarya jo bachha kisi ki madad se kar sakta hai, par akele nahi

questions.explanation: ZPD us antar ko kehte hain jo ek bachha akele kya kar sakta hai aur ek more knowledgeable other (jaise teacher ya parent) ki madad se kya kar sakta hai, uske beech hota hai.

questions.question: Bachhon mein 'Egocentrism' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Bachha doosron ka nazariya (perspective) nahi samajh pata
options.C: Bachha hamesha apni cheezein share karta hai

questions.explanation: Piaget ki theory ke anusar, egocentrism ka matlab hai ki bachha duniya ko sirf apne drishtikon se dekhta hai aur use yeh samajhne mein kathinai hoti hai ki doosron ka drishtikon alag ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Toddlers (1-3 saal ke bachhe) aksar 'No' kyun kehte hain?

options.B: Yeh unki aazadi (independence) aur apni pehchan banane ka ek hissa hai
options.C: Woh aapki baat samajh nahi paate
options.D: Woh aapko pareshan karna chahte hain

questions.explanation: 'No' kehna toddlers ke liye apni alag pehchan aur autonomy sthapit karne ka ek tarika hai. Yeh development ka ek normal charan hai.

questions.question: Ek bachhe ka dhyaan (attention span) badhane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use lambe samay tak ek hi jagah baithne ko force karna
options.B: Activity ko chote-chote, interesting steps mein todna
options.C: Use bahut saare toys ek saath de dena

questions.explanation: Chhote bachhon ka attention span kam hota hai. Activities ko short aur engaging rakhne se unka dhyaan bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Moral development (naitik vikas) ka shuruaati charan kya hai?

options.B: Saza se bachne ya inaam paane ke liye niyam manna
options.C: Samaj ke niyamo ko samajhna

questions.explanation: Shuruaat mein, bachhe naitikta ko saza aur inaam ke sandarbh mein dekhte hain. Woh wahi karte hain jisse unhe saza na mile ya shabashi mile.

questions.question: 'Scaffolding' teaching technique mein teacher ka kya role hota hai?

options.A: Bachhe ko saare answers bata dena
options.B: Bachhe ko zaroorat ke anusaar temporary support dena aur dheere-dheere use hata lena
options.C: Bachhe ko akele kaam karne ke liye chhod dena

questions.explanation: Vygotsky se judi 'Scaffolding' technique mein, teacher bachhe ko ek naya skill seekhne ke liye shuruaati madad deta hai aur jaise-jaise bachha seekhta jaata hai, woh support kam karta jaata hai.

questions.question: Erik Erikson ki 'Psychosocial Development' theory ke anusar, preschool (3-5 saal) ki age mein mukhya conflict kya hota hai?

options.B: Autonomy vs. Shame and Doubt
options.C: Initiative vs. Guilt

questions.explanation: Is stage mein, bachhe apne actions aur activities ko plan karne aur shuru karne ki koshish karte hain. Agar unhe iske liye protsahan milta hai to 'initiative' develop hota hai, anyatha 'guilt' ki bhavna aati hai.

questions.question: ECCE ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Early Childhood Care and Education
options.C: Easy Child Care and Education

questions.explanation: ECCE ka poora naam Early Childhood Care and Education hai, jiska arth hai prarambhik balyavastha dekhbhal aur shiksha.

questions.question: National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 ke anusaar, foundational stage ki age group kya hai?

options.B: 3 se 8 saal
options.C: 5 se 10 saal

questions.explanation: NEP 2020 ne 5+3+3+4 ka structure diya hai, jisme pehle 5 saal 'Foundational Stage' kehlate hain, jo 3 se 8 saal ki umar ke bachhon ko cover karta hai (3 saal preschool + Class 1 & 2).

questions.question: ECCE ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.A: Bachhon ko Class 1 ke liye taiyar karna
options.B: Bachhon ka sarvangeen vikas (holistic development) sunishchit karna
options.C: Bachhon ko anushasan mein rakhna

questions.explanation: ECCE ka mool uddeshya bachhe ke sharirik, mansik, samajik, bhavnatmak aur sangyanatmak vikas ko badhava dena hai.

questions.question: 'Play-based learning' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Kyunki bachhon ko padhai pasand nahi
options.B: Yeh bachhon ko natural aur anandmay tarike se seekhne mein madad karta hai
options.C: Yeh teacher ka kaam aasan kar deta hai
options.D: Isse school ka samay jaldi nikal jaata hai

questions.explanation: Khel-khel mein seekhna bachhon ke liye sabse prabhavi tarika hai. Isse unki creativity, problem-solving aur social skills develop hoti hain.

questions.question: Ek 'Inclusive Classroom' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Jahan sirf ladkiyan padhti hain
options.C: Jahan har tarah ki yogyata aur background ke bachhe ek saath padhte hain
options.D: Jahan sirf ameer bachhe padhte hain

questions.explanation: Inclusive (samaveshi) classroom ka matlab hai ek aisa learning environment banana jahan vishesh avashyaktaon (special needs) wale bachhon sahit sabhi bachhe ek saath, bina kisi bhedbhav ke seekh sakein.

questions.question: Bachhe ke vikas mein 'Holistic Development' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Sirf sharirik vikas
options.C: Sharirik, mansik, samajik, bhavnatmak aur bhashayi vikas

questions.explanation: Holistic ya sarvangeen vikas ka matlab hai bachhe ke vikas ke sabhi pehluon par dhyan dena, na ki sirf kisi ek par.

questions.question: ECCE mein 'Developmentally Appropriate Practice' (DAP) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabhi bachhon ko ek hi tarah se padhana
options.B: Bachhon ki umar aur vikas ke star ke anusaar teaching methods aur activities chunna
options.C: Sirf kathin activities karana

questions.explanation: DAP ka matlab hai ki shikshan prakriya bachhe ki umar, vyaktigat zarooraton aur sanskritik prishthbhumi (cultural background) ke anukool honi chahiye.

questions.question: Preschool mein assessment (mulyankan) ka sabse accha tarika kaun sa hai?

options.B: Bachhe ko marks ya grades dena
options.C: Lagatar avlokan (continuous observation) aur portfolio banana

questions.explanation: Chhote bachhon ka mulyankan unke kaam, vyavahar aur participation ko observe karke kiya jaana chahiye. Portfolio mein unke kaam ke samples (jaise drawings, craft) rakhe jaate hain.

questions.question: ECCE mein teacher-student ratio aamtaur par kam kyun rakha jaata hai?

options.A: Teacher ko aaram dene ke liye
options.B: Taaki har bachhe par vyaktigat dhyaan (individual attention) diya ja sake
options.C: School ka kharcha kam karne ke liye
options.D: Classroom ko chhota rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Kam teacher-student ratio se yeh sunishchit hota hai ki teacher har bachhe ki zarooraton, ruchi aur vikas ko behtar dhang se samajh sake aur us par dhyaan de sake.

questions.question: NEP 2020 ke anusar, Class 5 tak shiksha ka madhyam (medium of instruction) kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Sirf Hindi
options.C: Matrubhasha / sthaniya bhasha (Mother tongue / local language)

questions.explanation: NEP 2020 is baat par zor deti hai ki jahan tak sambhav ho, kam se kam Grade 5 tak shiksha ka madhyam matrubhasha, sthaniya bhasha ya kshetriya bhasha honi chahiye.

questions.question: Friedrich Froebel ko kiske avishkarak ke roop mein jaana jaata hai?

options.B: Kindergarten
options.C: Play-way Method

questions.explanation: Friedrich Froebel ne 'Kindergarten' (bachhon ka bageecha) ki avdharna di, jahan bachhe khel aur sanrachit gatividhiyon (structured activities) ke madhyam se seekhte hain.

questions.question: Maria Montessori ka vishwas tha ki bachhe behtar seekhte hain jab...

options.A: Unhe sakht nirdesh diye jaate hain
options.B: Unhe ek taiyar kiye gaye vatavaran mein apni gati se explore karne ki aazadi ho
options.C: Unhe group mein kaam karne ke liye majboor kiya jaata hai
options.D: Unhe technology ka upyog karne diya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Montessori paddhati ek 'prepared environment' par zor deti hai jahan bachhe self-directed learning ke madhyam se apni ruchi ke anusaar seekhte hain.

questions.question: Bachhe ke 'school readiness' se kya tatparya hai?

options.A: Bachha A, B, C, D aur 1, 2, 3, 4 likh sakta hai
options.B: Bachha sharirik, samajik, bhavnatmak aur sangyanatmak roop se formal schooling ke liye taiyar hai
options.C: Bachhe ki umar 6 saal ho gayi hai
options.D: Bachhe ne naya school bag aur uniform khareed liya hai

questions.explanation: School readiness sirf academic skills nahi hai, balki isme bachhe ka overall development shamil hai, jaise ki nirdeshon ka palan karna, doosron ke saath mil-jul kar rehna, aur apni zarooraton ko vyakt kar pana.

questions.question: ECCE curriculum mein 'experiential learning' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Karke seekhna (Learning by doing)
options.C: Teacher ko sunna

questions.explanation: Experiential learning ya anubhav-janya adhigam ka matlab hai ki bachhe hands-on activities aur real-world experiences ke zariye seekhte hain.

questions.question: Right to Education (RTE) Act, 2009 kis age group ke bachhon ke liye free aur anivarya shiksha sunishchit karta hai?

options.B: 6 se 14 saal
options.C: 5 se 15 saal

questions.explanation: RTE Act, 2009 ke tahat 6 se 14 saal ki umar ke har bachhe ko muft aur anivarya prarambhik shiksha ka maulik adhikar hai.

questions.question: NCF 2005 (National Curriculum Framework) ke anusar, gyan (knowledge) kya hai?

options.A: Ek aisi cheez jo teacher dwara di jaati hai aur bachhe dwara li jaati hai
options.B: Ek aisi cheez jo bachhe apne anubhavon se swayam nirmit karte hain
options.C: Jo kuch bhi kitabon mein likha hai

questions.explanation: NCF 2005 'constructivism' par zor deta hai, jiska matlab hai ki bachhe gyan ke passive receiver nahi hain, balki apne anubhavon ke aadhar par gyan ka nirman (construct) karte hain.

questions.question: Anganwadi centres ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Bachhon aur garbhvati mahilaon ko swasthya, poshan aur prarambhik shiksha pradan karna
options.C: Sirf preschool shiksha dena

questions.explanation: Anganwadi Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) scheme ka hissa hai, jiska lakshya 0-6 saal ke bachhon, garbhvati mahilaon aur stanpan karane wali maataon ke swasthya aur poshan mein sudhar karna hai.

questions.question: Ek achhe lesson plan mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Learning objectives, activities, aur assessment method
options.C: Sirf activities ki list

questions.explanation: Ek complete lesson plan mein yeh spasht hona chahiye ki bachhe kya seekhenge (objectives), woh kaise seekhenge (activities), aur unhone seekha hai ya nahi, yeh kaise jaana jayega (assessment).

questions.question: 'Thematic Curriculum' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek central theme (jaise 'paani' ya 'janwar') ke aas-paas sabhi subjects ki activities ko jodna
options.C: Sirf ek hi theme poore saal padhana

questions.explanation: Thematic approach mein, ek vishay jaise 'transport' chun kar usse judi bhasha, ganit, kala, aur vigyan ki gatividhiyan plan ki jaati hain. Isse learning zyada meaningful aur connected hoti hai.

questions.question: Learning Objective (seekhne ka uddeshya) likhte samay, kaisa verb istemal karna chahiye?

options.B: Aisa jise maapa ya dekha ja sake (jaise 'pehchanenge', 'ginenge')
options.C: Aisa jo bahut kathin ho

questions.explanation: Learning objectives specific aur measurable hone chahiye. 'Pehchanenge' (identify) ya 'Ginenge' (count) jaise action verbs ka upyog karna chahiye, na ki 'Samjhenge' (understand) jaise vague verbs ka.

questions.question: Preschool ki daily schedule (dinacharya) kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Flexible, jisme free play, group activities, aur aaram ka santulan ho
options.C: Poore din sirf padhai

questions.explanation: Ek achhi dinacharya predictable hoti hai, jisse bachhe surakshit mehsoos karte hain, lekin usme lacheelapan (flexibility) bhi hona chahiye. Isme active aur quiet activities ka balance zaroori hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein 'Learning Corners' banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Bachhon ko alag-alag tarah ki activities mein engage karne ka mauka milta hai
options.C: Teacher ko aaram milta hai

questions.explanation: Learning corners jaise Book corner, Art corner, Block corner bachhon ko apni ruchi ke anusaar chayan karne aur small groups mein seekhne ke avsar pradan karte hain.

questions.question: Ek activity plan karte samay, sabse pehle kya sochna chahiye?

options.B: Is activity se bachhe kya seekhenge (learning objective)
options.C: Activity mein kitna samay lagega

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi activity ki planning uske learning objective se shuru honi chahiye. Pehle yeh tay karein ki aap bachhon ko kya sikhana chahte hain, fir uske anusaar activity design karein.

questions.question: Bachhon ke kaam ka 'Portfolio' kya hota hai?

options.B: Unke kaam (drawings, writing samples, etc.) ka ek systematic collection jo unki progress dikhata hai
options.C: Unki shikayaton ki file

questions.explanation: Portfolio assessment ka ek tarika hai jisme samay ke saath bachhe ke kaam ke namoono ko ekattha kiya jaata hai, jisse unke vikas aur seekhne ki prakriya ka pata chalta hai.

questions.question: Curriculum planning mein 'spiral approach' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek topic ko ek baar padha kar chhod dena
options.B: Ek hi topic ko alag-alag samay par zyada gehrai aur jatilta (complexity) ke saath baar-baar padhana
options.C: Topics ko gol-gol ghumakar padhana

questions.explanation: Spiral curriculum mein, mool concepts ko baar-baar revisit kiya jaata hai, lekin har baar unhe pehle se adhik advanced level par sikhaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Age-appropriate activities ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Aisi activities jo bachhon ki umar ke hisab se bahut aasan ho
options.B: Aisi activities jo bachhon ki umar ke hisab se bahut mushkil ho
options.C: Aisi activities jo bachhon ki umar aur vikas ke star ke liye aakarshak aur chunautipurn (challenging) ho
options.D: Aisi activities jo sirf bado ko pasand ho

questions.explanation: Activities na toh itni aasan honi chahiye ki bachhe bore ho jayein, aur na hi itni mushkil ki woh frustrate ho jayein. Woh unke developmental level ke anukool honi chahiye.

questions.question: Circle Time ka mukhya uddeshya kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek community feeling banana, jahan bachhe share karein, gaayein aur kahaniyan sunein
options.C: Attendance lena

questions.explanation: Circle Time din ki shuruaat karne ka ek accha tarika hai. Isse bachhon mein listening skills, confidence aur ek doosre se judav ki bhavna badhti hai.

questions.question: Outdoor play ko curriculum mein shamil karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki bachhe class se bahar jaakar shor macha sakein
options.B: Yeh unke gross motor skills, social skills aur nature se judav ke liye zaroori hai
options.C: Yeh anivarya nahi hai
options.D: Isse teacher ko break milta hai

questions.explanation: Bahar khelne se bachhon ka sharirik vikas hota hai, woh risk lena seekhte hain, nature ko explore karte hain aur doosre bachhon ke saath mil-baant kar khelna seekhte hain.

questions.question: Observation ke liye 'Anecdotal Record' kya hota hai?

options.A: Bachhe ki roz ki photo lena
options.B: Kisi khaas ghatna ya vyavahar ka chhota, factual vivaran likhna
options.C: Bachhe ke baare mein kahani likhna

questions.explanation: Anecdotal record ek observation tool hai jisme teacher bachhe ke kisi specific behavior ya incident ka sankshipt aur objective (vastunishth) varnan likhta hai, jisme date, time aur setting shamil hoti hai.

questions.question: Lesson plan mein 'transition' time ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek activity se doosri activity mein jaane ke beech ka samay
options.C: Chhutti ka samay

questions.explanation: Transition time ko plan karna zaroori hai taaki ek activity se doosri mein shift smooth ho aur classroom mein chaos na ho. Iske liye gaane ya chhoti games ka istemal kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek pre-primary curriculum kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Teacher-centered (shikshak-kendrit)
options.C: Exam-centered (pariksha-kendrit)

questions.explanation: Pre-primary curriculum bachhe ki zarooraton, ruchi aur vikas ke star ko dhyaan mein rakhkar banaya jaana chahiye. Bachha seekhne ki prakriya ke kendra mein hona chahiye.

questions.question: Bloom's Taxonomy ke anusar, seekhne ka sabse nichla star (lowest level) kya hai?

options.B: Evaluating (mulyankan karna)
options.C: Analyzing (vishleshan karna)

questions.explanation: Bloom's Taxonomy ke revised version mein, six levels hain: Remembering, Understanding, Applying, Analyzing, Evaluating, and Creating. Remembering (jaise tathyon ko yaad karna) sabse buniyadi star hai.

questions.question: Weekly plan banate samay, ek teacher ko kya nahi karna chahiye?

options.A: Alag-alag learning areas (jaise bhasha, ganit, kala) ko shamil karna
options.B: Har din bilkul ek jaisi activities rakhna
options.C: Bachhon ki ruchi ko dhyaan mein rakhna
options.D: Indoor aur outdoor activities ka balance rakhna

questions.explanation: Weekly plan mein vividhta (variety) honi chahiye taaki bachhe bore na hon aur unke vikas ke sabhi pehluon par dhyaan diya ja sake. Roz ek jaisi activities se unki ruchi khatm ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Assessment aur Evaluation mein kya mukhya antar hai?

options.B: Assessment ek lagatar chalne wali prakriya (process-oriented) hai, jabki evaluation ant mein parinam (product-oriented) batata hai
options.C: Evaluation pehle hota hai, assessment baad mein
options.D: Assessment sirf teacher karte hain, evaluation parents karte hain

questions.explanation: Assessment (aakalan) teaching-learning process ke dauran sudhar ke liye kiya jaata hai (jaise observation). Evaluation (mulyankan) ant mein yeh jaanne ke liye hota hai ki objectives poore hue ya nahi (jaise report card).

questions.question: Storytelling (kahani sunana) ka sabse accha tarika kya hai?

options.A: Kitab se tezi se padh dena
options.B: Voice modulation (awaaz mein utaar-chadhav), expressions aur puppets ka istemal karna
options.C: Sirf kahani ke chitra dikhana
options.D: Bachhon se kahani padhne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Kahani ko jeevant banane ke liye awaaz, chehre ke bhaav aur props (jaise puppets) ka istemal karna chahiye. Isse bachhe kahani se jud paate hain aur unki kalpana shakti badhti hai.

questions.question: TLM ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Teaching Learning Material
options.C: Teacher Learning Method

questions.explanation: TLM ka poora naam Teaching Learning Material hai. Isme woh sabhi saamagri aati hai jiska upyog teacher padhane ko rochak aur prabhavi banane ke liye karta hai, jaise charts, models, flashcards, etc.

questions.question: Low-cost/No-cost TLM ka kya udaharan hai?

options.B: Projector
options.C: Khaali dibbe, purane akhbaar, aur pattharon se banayi gayi saamagri

questions.explanation: Low-cost/No-cost TLM ka matlab hai aisi shikshan saamagri jo aas-paas uplabdh bekar ya sasti cheezon se banayi jaaye, jaise plastic bottles se counting aids banana.

questions.question: Rhymes aur songs bachhon ko kya seekhne mein madad karte hain?

options.A: Bhasha ka vikas (language development) aur phonological awareness
options.B: Sirf manoranjan
options.C: Ganit (Maths)

questions.explanation: Kavitaon aur geeton se bachhe naye shabd seekhte hain, unki sunne ki kshamta badhti hai aur unhe shabdon ki dhwani (sounds) ko pehchanne mein madad milti hai, jo padhne ki neev hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein ek print-rich environment banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Bachhon mein padhne aur likhne ke prati ruchi jagti hai
options.C: Teacher ka kaam badh jaata hai

questions.explanation: Jab classroom ki deewaron par charts, bachhon ke naam, labels, aur kahaniyan lagi hoti hain, to bachhe samajhte hain ki likhi hui cheezon ka koi matlab hota hai. Isse literacy skills ko badhava milta hai.

questions.question: Role-playing activity se bachhon mein kaun sa skill develop hota hai?

options.B: Samajik aur samvad kaushal (Social and communication skills)
options.C: Ganit ka skill

questions.explanation: Role-playing (jaise doctor-patient ka khel) se bachhe alag-alag paristhitiyon mein communicate karna, doosron ke nazariye ko samajhna aur samasyaon ko suljhana seekhte hain.

questions.question: Sand play ya water play se bachhon ko kya laabh hota hai?

options.B: Yeh unke sensory experiences (samvedi anubhav) aur vigyan ke concepts ko समझने mein madad karta hai
options.C: Yeh samay ki barbadi hai

questions.explanation: Ret aur paani se khelne par bachhon ki sparsh (touch) indriya sakriya hoti hai. Woh naapne, daalne jaise shuruaati ganit aur vigyan ke concepts ko anubhav se seekhte hain.

questions.question: Bachhon ko 'pre-writing skills' sikhane ke liye kaun si activity sabse acchi hai?

options.B: Scribbling, tearing paper, play dough se khelna, aur lacing karna
options.C: Unhe copy mein lines bharne ko dena
options.D: Unhe computer par type karne dena

questions.explanation: Likhna shuru karne se pehle, bachhon ki ungliyon aur haathon ki muscles ka vikas zaroori hai. Play dough, tearing, scribbling jaisi activities in fine motor skills ko develop karti hain.

questions.question: Ek 'Open-ended question' kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek sawal jiska jawab 'haan' ya 'na' mein ho
options.B: Ek sawal jiske kai possible jawab ho sakte hain aur jo sochne ke liye prerit kare
options.C: Ek sawal jiska jawab teacher ko pehle se pata ho
options.D: Ek sawal jo syllabus se bahar ho

questions.explanation: Open-ended questions (jaise 'Aapko is kahani mein aage kya lagta hai?') bachhon ki soch, kalpana aur bhasha ko badhava dete hain, jabki closed-ended questions (jaise 'Seb ka rang kya hai?') sirf ratne par zor dete hain.

questions.question: Flashcards ka istemal mukhya roop se kis liye kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Akshar, shabd, rang, ya sankhyaon ki pehchan karwane ke liye
options.C: Drawing sikhane ke liye
options.D: Class ko shaant rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Flashcards ek visual tool hain jinka upyog naye concepts, jaise alphabets, numbers, shapes, aur vocabulary ko introduce karne aur revise karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Puppets (kathputliyon) ka istemal karne se kya fayda hota hai?

options.B: Sharmile bachhe bhi puppets ke zariye apne aap ko express kar paate hain
options.C: Yeh sirf manoranjan ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Puppets ek non-threatening tool hain. Jo bachhe seedhe baat karne mein hichkichate hain, woh aksar puppet ke peeche chhupkar apni bhavnaon aur vicharon ko aasani se vyakt kar dete hain.

questions.question: Field trip (educational tour) plan karte samay sabse zaroori cheez kya hai?

options.A: Jagah ki suraksha aur bachhon ki nigrani
options.B: Wahan par kitna maza aayega
options.C: Khane-peene ka intezam

questions.explanation: Jabki baki sab cheezein bhi zaroori hain, bachhon ki suraksha (safety) ek field trip mein sabse pehli prathmikta honi chahiye. Proper supervision aur safety measures anivarya hain.

questions.question: Differentiated instruction ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabhi bachhon ko ek hi tarah se padhana
options.B: Classroom mein bachhon ki alag-alag zarooraton aur learning styles ke anusaar teaching methods ko badalna
options.C: Sirf hoshiyar bachhon par dhyaan dena
options.D: Sirf kamzor bachhon par dhyaan dena

questions.explanation: Is approach mein, teacher yeh samajhta hai ki har bachha alag hai, aur isliye woh ek hi topic ko padhane ke liye alag-alag tarike, materials, aur assessment ka istemal karta hai taaki sabhi bachhe seekh sakein.

questions.question: Building blocks se khelne se mukhya roop se kaun se skills develop hote hain?

options.B: Bhasha ka vikas
options.C: Problem-solving, creativity, aur shuruaati Maths/Science concepts

questions.explanation: Blocks se khelte hue bachhe balance, gravity jaise science concepts, aur size, shape jaise maths concepts seekhte hain. Saath hi, kya banana hai aur kaise banana hai, yeh sochna unki problem-solving skills aur creativity ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Ek teacher ko technology (jaise tablet ya educational apps) ka istemal kaise karna chahiye?

options.A: Bachhon ko shaant rakhne ke liye babysitter ki tarah
options.B: Seekhne ki prakriya ko support karne ke liye ek tool ki tarah, na ki teacher ki jagah lene ke liye
options.C: Poore din bachhon ko usi par laga dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Technology ka istemal soch-samajhkar aur santulit roop se hona chahiye. Yeh interactive learning ko badhava de sakti hai lekin hands-on activities aur human interaction ka sthan nahi le sakti.

questions.question: Gardner ki 'Multiple Intelligences' theory ke anusaar, ek bachha jo music aur rhythm mein accha hai, usme kaun si intelligence zyada hai?

options.B: Logical-Mathematical Intelligence
options.C: Musical Intelligence

questions.explanation: Howard Gardner ne alag-alag prakar ki buddhi (intelligence) ka siddhant diya. Musical intelligence wale log sounds, rhythms aur patterns ke prati sanvedansheel hote hain.

questions.question: Project-based learning mein teacher ka role kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek dictator ka jo sab kuch batata hai
options.B: Ek facilitator (suvidhadata) ka jo bachhon ko guide aur support karta hai
options.C: Ek observer ka jo kuch nahi karta
options.D: Ek examiner ka jo sirf test leta hai

questions.explanation: Project-based learning mein bachhe active roop se kisi project par kaam karke seekhte hain. Teacher ka kaam unhe zaroori sansadhan (resources) uplabdh karana, unka margdarshan karna aur unki soch ko prerit karna hota hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein positive behaviour ko badhava dene ka sabse accha tarika kya hai?

options.B: Achhe vyavahar ke liye bachhon ki prashansa karna (praise)
options.C: Niyam todne par saza dena

questions.explanation: Positive reinforcement, jaise ki prashansa karna ya sticker dena, achhe vyavahar ko badhava dene ke liye saza dene se kahin zyada prabhavi hai.

questions.question: Classroom ke niyam (rules) kaise hone chahiye?

options.B: Sirf teacher dwara banaye gaye
options.C: Sankshipt, positive, aur bachhon ke saath milkar banaye gaye

questions.explanation: Jab niyam banane mein bachhon ko shamil kiya jaata hai, to woh unhe apnate hain. Niyam positive hone chahiye (jaise 'Walk slowly' na ki 'Don't run') aur sankhya mein kam hone chahiye.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha doosre bachhe ko maarta hai, to teacher ko turant kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Pehale dono ko alag karna, fir jis bachhe ko chot lagi hai use comfort karna, aur baad mein shanti se mamla suljhana
options.C: Jisne maara hai use wapas maarne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle suraksha sunishchit karni chahiye. Fir, jis bachhe ko takleef hui hai use sahanubhuti deni chahiye. Iske baad, shant mahaul mein dono bachhon se baat karke unhe sahi vyavahar sikhana chahiye.

questions.question: Classroom mein bachhon ke liye ek surakshit (safe) mahaul banane ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.A: Sharp objects, choti cheezein jinko nigla ja sake, aur chemical bachhon ki pahunch se door rakhna
options.B: Classroom ko hamesha band rakhna
options.C: Bachhon ko daudne-bhaagne na dena

questions.explanation: Physical safety ke liye zaroori hai ki classroom se sabhi khatarnak cheezein hata di jaayein aur furniture aisa ho jiske kone sharp na ho.

questions.question: Ek bachha jo tantrum (bahut zyada rona-chillana) kar raha hai, use handle karne ka accha tarika kya hai?

options.A: Uski har maang poori kar dena
options.B: Us par chillana
options.C: Yeh sunishchit karna ki bachha surakshit hai aur uske shant hone ka intezar karna, fir usse baat karna
options.D: Use class se bahar nikal dena

questions.explanation: Tantrum ke dauran bachhe ke saath tark karna bekar hai. Pehle uski suraksha sunishchit karein aur use shant hone de. Baad mein, uski bhavnaon ko naam dekar (jaise 'Aap gussa the') usse baat karein.

questions.question: Classroom mein bullying (dhamkana) ko rokne ke liye teacher ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Ise bachhon ka aapsi mamla samajh kar chhod dena
options.B: Zero-tolerance policy apnana aur bachhon ko sahanubhuti (empathy) sikhana
options.C: Sirf jis bachhe ko bully kiya ja raha hai, use samjhana
options.D: Bully karne wale bachhe ko sabke saamne sharminda karna

questions.explanation: Bullying ko kabhi bhi andekha nahi karna chahiye. Classroom mein spasht niyam hone chahiye ki bullying sweekar nahi ki jayegi aur bachhon ko ek doosre ki feelings ka samman karna sikhana chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aapko kisi bachhe par physical abuse (sharirik shoshan) ka sandeh ho to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Bachhe ke parents se seedhe arop lagana
options.B: Apne school ke Principal ya designated authority ko turant soochit karna
options.C: Is baat ko ignore kar dena kyunki yeh aapka kaam nahi hai

questions.explanation: Ek teacher ke roop mein, aapki zimmedari hai ki child abuse ke kisi bhi sandeh ko school ke nirdharit protocol ke anusar apne senior ko report karein. Aapko khud jaanch-padtaal nahi karni chahiye.

questions.question: Fire drill (aag se bachav ka abhyas) school mein kyun karayi jaati hai?

options.A: Class se chhutti lene ke liye
options.B: Bachhon ko darane ke liye
options.C: Taaki aapat sthiti mein bachhon aur staff ko pata ho ki surakshit roop se kaise bahar nikalna hai

questions.explanation: Fire drill ek practice session hai jo sabhi ko emergency evacuation routes aur procedures se parichit karata hai taaki vastavik aapat sthiti mein sabhi surakshit reh sakein.

questions.question: Emotional safety (bhavnatmak suraksha) ka classroom mein kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek aisa mahaul jahan bachhe bina dar ke apne vichar vyakt kar sakein aur galtiyan kar sakein
options.C: Bachhon ko kabhi rone na dena

questions.explanation: Bhavnatmak suraksha tab hoti hai jab bachhe mehsoos karte hain ki unhe accept kiya jaata hai, unka samman kiya jaata hai, aur woh bina kisi alochana ya upahas ke dar ke risk le sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar koi bachha apni cheezein doosron ke saath share nahi karna chahta, to aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usse zabardasti cheezein lekar doosre bachhe ko de denge
options.C: Sharing ke concept ko dheere-dheere games aur stories ke zariye samjhayenge, lekin use majboor nahi karenge
options.D: Uski shikayat uske parents se karenge

questions.explanation: Chhote bachhon ke liye sharing ek mushkil concept ho sakta hai. Unhe zabardasti karne ke bajaye, sharing ke fayde dikhana aur unhe iske liye protsahit karna behtar hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein First-Aid box mein kya hona anivarya hai?

options.B: Antiseptic liquid, cotton, bandages, aur medical tape
options.C: Cough syrup

questions.explanation: First-Aid box mein chhoti-moti choton ke upchar ke liye buniyadi saamagri jaise antiseptic, rui, pattiyaan, aur tape zaroor honi chahiye. Teacher ko dawaiyan dene ki anumati nahi hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek acchi seating arrangement kaisi honi chahiye?

options.A: Aisi jahan teacher sabhi bachhon ko aasani se dekh sake aur bachhe bhi teacher/board ko dekh sakein
options.B: Bachhon ko hamesha seedhi lines mein baithana
options.C: Roz seating arrangement badalna
options.D: Bachhon ko jahan marzi wahan baithne dena

questions.explanation: Seating arrangement aisi honi chahiye jo supervision aur interaction dono ko suvidhajanak banaye. Yeh flexible ho sakti hai (kabhi circle, kabhi small groups) lekin teacher ki sabhi bachhon tak pahunch honi chahiye.

questions.question: 'Good Touch' aur 'Bad Touch' ke baare mein bachhon ko sikhana kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Yeh unhe personal safety aur body boundaries ke baare mein jagruk karta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf parents ka kaam hai
options.D: Is umar mein yeh sikhana zaroori nahi hai

questions.explanation: Bachhon ko unki umar ke anusaar saral bhasha mein 'Good Touch' aur 'Bad Touch' ke baare mein batana unhe child sexual abuse se bachane ke liye ek mahatvapurna kadam hai.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha consistently doosre bachhon se alag-thalag rehta hai, to yeh kiska sanket ho sakta hai?

options.B: Woh sharmila ho sakta hai ya kisi social/emotional samasya se guzar raha ho sakta hai
options.C: Use khelna pasand nahi hai
options.D: Woh doosre bachhon se behtar hai

questions.explanation: Jabki kuch bachhe svabhav se sharmile hote hain, lagatar alag rehna is baat ka sanket ho sakta hai ki bachhe ko social skills mein dikkat hai ya woh kisi chinta ya pareshani mein hai. Teacher ko is par dhyaan dena chahiye.

questions.question: Classroom mein 'Active Listening' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Bachhe ki baat ko dhyaan se sunna, use samajhna, aur us par pratikriya dena
options.C: Bachhe ke bolte samay apna kaam karte rehna
options.D: Bachhe ko beech mein tok dena

questions.explanation: Active listening ka matlab hai poora dhyaan dekar sunna. Isme non-verbal cues (jaise sir hilana) aur verbal cues (jaise 'अच्छा, फिर क्या हुआ?') shamil hain. Isse bachha mehsoos karta hai ki uski baat ko mahatva diya ja raha hai.

questions.question: Ek naye bachhe ko class mein adjust hone mein madad karne ke liye aap kya kar sakte hain?

options.A: Use akele chhod dena taaki woh khud adjust kare
options.B: Use ek 'buddy' (dost) assign karna jo use school dikhaye aur uske saath khele
options.C: Use pehle din hi sabke saamne kuch sunane ko kehna
options.D: Us par zyada dhyaan na dena

questions.explanation: Ek buddy system naye bachhe ko kam akela aur zyada comfortable mehsoos karne mein madad karta hai. Ek purana student naye student ko routine aur logon se parichit kara sakta hai.

questions.question: Conflict resolution (jhadge suljhana) sikhane ka sabse accha tarika kya hai?

options.B: Bachhon ko apni feelings batane aur samasya ka samadhan dhoondne ke liye protsahit karna
options.C: Jisne galti ki use saza dena
options.D: Bachhon ko aapas mein jhagadne dena

questions.explanation: Teacher ko ek mediator ki tarah kaam karna chahiye, bachhon ko 'I feel...' statements ka istemal karke apni baat kehne aur milkar ek samadhan tak pahunchne mein madad karni chahiye.

questions.question: Bachhon ke liye balanced diet (santulit aahar) kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf unhe mota karne ke liye
options.B: Unke sahi sharirik aur mansik vikas ke liye
options.C: Taaki woh bimar na padein

questions.explanation: Ek balanced diet mein sabhi zaroori poshak tatva (nutrients) hote hain jo bachhe ke brain development, haddiyon ki mazbooti aur overall growth ke liye anivarya hain.

questions.question: School mein bachhon ko haath dhone (handwashing) ke liye kab-kab prerit karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf jab unke haath gande dikhein
options.B: Khana khane se pehle, toilet use karne ke baad, aur bahar se khel kar aane ke baad
options.C: Sirf din mein ek baar

questions.explanation: Sahi samay par haath dhona keetanuon (germs) ko phailne se rokne aur bimariyon se bachne ka sabse aasan aur prabhavi tarika hai.

questions.question: Parent-Teacher Meeting (PTM) ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.A: Parent se bachhe ki shikayat karna
options.B: School ki fees ke baare mein baat karna
options.C: Bachhe ki progress aur vikas par charcha karne ke liye teacher aur parent ke beech ek saajhedari banana
options.D: Parent ko school ke niyam batana

questions.explanation: PTM ek two-way communication hai jahan teacher aur parent dono bachhe ke behtar vikas ke liye jaankari aur sujhav aadan-pradan karte hain.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha school mein bimar pad jaata hai, to teacher ka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Use class mein hi baithaye rakhna
options.C: Uske parents ko turant soochit karna aur use aaram karne ke liye aisi jagah le jaana

questions.explanation: Teacher ko bachhe ko dawai dene ka adhikar nahi hai. Unhe turant parents ko inform karna chahiye aur school ki policy ke anusaar bachhe ki dekhbhal karni chahiye jab tak parents aa na jaayein.

questions.question: Bachhe ki school diary ya communication book ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Teacher aur parents ke beech roz ki zaroori soochanaon ke aadan-pradan ke liye
options.C: Bachhe ke drawing banane ke liye
options.D: Iska koi khaas upyog nahi hai

questions.explanation: Yeh ek mahatvapurna communication tool hai jiske zariye teacher parents ko bachhe ki activities ya kisi zaroori baat ke baare mein bata sakta hai aur parents bhi teacher ko koi soochana de sakte hain.

questions.question: Junk food (jaise chips, cold drinks) bachhon ke liye kyu hanikarak hai?

options.B: Isme poshan kam aur sugar, salt, fat zyada hota hai, jo motapa aur anya bimariyan paida kar sakta hai
options.C: Yeh bahut sasta hota hai

questions.explanation: Junk food mein 'empty calories' hoti hain, jiska matlab hai ki usse energy to milti hai par zaroori vitamins aur minerals nahi milte, jo bachhe ke vikas ke liye aavashyak hain.

questions.question: Ek PTM mein parent ko bachhe ke baare mein feedback kaise dena chahiye?

options.B: Pehle bachhe ki acchi baaton (strengths) se shuruaat karna, fir sudhar ke kshetron (areas of improvement) par charcha karna
options.C: Doosre bachhon se tulna karna

questions.explanation: Ek positive note par shuruaat karne se parent defensive nahi hote. Hamesha constructive feedback dena chahiye, jisme samasya ke saath-saath samadhan par bhi baat ho.

questions.question: Bachhon mein daanton ki safai (oral hygiene) ki aadat kaise daalein?

options.B: School mein brushing ko ek fun activity banakar aur iske fayde batakar
options.C: Yeh sirf parents ki zimmedari hai
options.D: Unhe meetha khane se rok kar

questions.explanation: School mein group brushing session ya songs ke zariye bachhon ko brushing ke liye protsahit kiya ja sakta hai. Unhe batana ki isse unke daant mazboot aur chamakdar rahenge, unhe prerit karta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi parent teacher se unki teaching method par asahmati jatata hai, to teacher ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Parent ki baat ko shaanti se sunna, apne tarike ke peeche ka tark (rationale) samjhana, aur unke sujhavon par vichar karna
options.C: Parent ko ignore karna

questions.explanation: Ek professional teacher ko defensive hone ke bajaye, parent ke concern ko sunna chahiye. Ek open aur respectful communication se aksar galatfehmi door ho jaati hai aur ek behtar samadhan nikalta hai.

questions.question: Bachhon ki paryapt neend (sufficient sleep) kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki woh parents ko pareshan na karein
options.B: Yeh unke physical growth, learning, aur mood regulation ke liye zaroori hai
options.C: Neend zaroori nahi hai
options.D: Taaki woh school mein soyein nahi

questions.explanation: Neend ke dauran bachhe ka sharir aur dimaag grow aur repair hota hai. Acchi neend se unki concentration aur memory bhi behtar hoti hai.

questions.question: School health record mein kya jaankari honi chahiye?

options.A: Sirf bachhe ka naam aur pata
options.B: Bachhe ki height, weight, vaccination status, allergies, aur emergency contact number
options.C: Bachhe ke grades

questions.explanation: Ek comprehensive health record emergency ki sthiti mein bahut madadgar hota hai aur school ko bachhe ki specific health needs (jaise allergy) ke baare mein jagruk rakhta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha lunch mein hamesha unhealthy food laata hai, to teacher ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Sabke saamne use daantna
options.C: Parent se akele mein, narmata se baat karke unhe healthy options ke baare mein sujhav dena
options.D: Kuch nahi karna, yeh unka personal mamla hai

questions.explanation: Bachhe ko sharminda karne ke bajaye, parent se sahyogpurn tarike se baat karna behtar hai. Aap unhe healthy aur aasan tiffin ideas de sakte hain ya school mein nutrition par workshop aayojit kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Community involvement (samudayik bhagidari) school ke liye kyun faydemand hai?

options.A: Isse school ka kaam badh jaata hai
options.B: Yeh school ko resources (jaise guest speakers, volunteers) pradan karta hai aur bachhon ko unke aas-paas ki duniya se jodta hai
options.C: Iska koi fayda nahi hai
options.D: Yeh sirf fund-raising ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: Jab school community ke saath judta hai (jaise local doctor ko health talk ke liye bulana), to bachhon ko real-world learning experience milta hai aur school ko community ka support bhi milta hai.

questions.question: Ek bachhe ki confidentiality (gopniyata) banaye rakhne ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Bachhe ke baare mein kisi se baat na karna
options.B: Bachhe ki personal ya sensitive jaankari (jaise uski family problem ya health issue) ko sirf zaroorat padne par authorized logon se hi share karna
options.C: Bachhe ki saari jaankari staff room mein discuss karna
options.D: Bachhe ki jaankari doosre parents ke saath share karna

questions.explanation: Ek teacher ka professional dayitva hai ki woh bachhe aur uske parivar se judi gopniya jaankari ka samman kare aur use bina anumati ke kisi se saajha na kare.

questions.question: Agar ek parent aapki salah ya feedback ko sweekar nahi kar raha hai, to aapka agla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Unse baat karna band kar dena
options.B: Unhe galat saabit karne ki koshish karna
options.C: Unke perspective ko samajhne ki koshish karna, unhe samay dena, aur zaroorat padne par school counsellor ya principal ko shamil karna
options.D: Bachhe par zyada dhyaan na dena

questions.explanation: Communication ek process hai. Agar turant sehmati nahi banti hai, to rishta kharab karne ke bajaye dhairya rakhein, unki chintaon ko samjhein aur ek team ke roop mein kaam karne ka prayaas karein, jisme zaroorat padne par anya professionals ki madad li ja sakti hai.
